## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Installer or packaging

## Edition affected

- [ ] Python
- [ ] PHP
- [ ] Both
- [ ] Docs / CI only

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested locally (or explained why not)
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes (Python changes)
- [ ] PHP `php -l` clean if PHP files changed
- [ ] If PHP UI/logic changed, I ran `./installers/php-host/package.sh` and committed the zip
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets (`.env`, API keys, `config.php`, databases) included
